title: Elderly Care Program Educational Objectives
content:
Elderly Care Program Educational Objectives

1. Providing the physical, psychological and social care that elderly individuals need.

2. Preparing and providing suitable living environments for the elderly.

3. Monitoring the health status of elderly individuals and providing preventive and supportive care services.

4. Implementing practices that will increase the quality of life of the elderly.

5. Developing individual-specific, ethical and dignified approaches in care processes.

6. Gaining the ability to implement and develop elderly care services.

7. Developing the ability to think analytically and with a solution-oriented approach to problems.

8. Strengthening interdisciplinary cooperation by gaining a tendency towards teamwork.

9. Adhering to ethical values as individuals with a sense of professional responsibility.

10. Continuing professional development by following current information, methods and technologies regarding elderly care.
